description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with a weathered, rustic appearance, featuring visible wood grain and dovetail joints at the corners. The front face has a small, simple metal handle and a keyhole, suggesting it can be locked for security. The lid appears to be hinged at the back, running the full length of the box, and fits snugly over the top. The wood shows signs of age and use, with some discoloration and dark stains, adding to its vintage character. The box is solid and robust, likely designed to store tools, documents, or other valuables in an urban or garage setting. Its flat top surface can also serve as a temporary platform for placing other objects.
description: A weathered wooden storage box with dovetail joints, a hinged lid, and a metal handle with a keyhole on the front. The box has a rustic, aged appearance and a sturdy, flat top.
description_view_0: End view showing the dovetail joints and the solid wooden construction, with no visible handle or lock.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the metal handle, keyhole, and the main access point for opening the box.
description_view_2: Opposite end view, similar to view 0, with visible wood grain and some dark stains but no handle or lock.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the continuous wood grain and the back edge of the hinged lid, with no handle or lock visible.
